exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your blended family creation forward
items: Create a family meeting schedule and establish ground rules for regular family discussions
Design and implement a shared family calendar system that includes custody schedules, activities, and important dates for all family members
Create individual bonding activities between each step-parent and step-child to build one-on-one relationships
Establish consistent household rules and consequences that apply equally to all children regardless of biological relationships
Create new family traditions that include all children and honor both families\
